allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_MainWindowTitle -like ''*Supermarket*'' -or $_Name -like ''*electron*'' -or $_Name -like ''*Supermarket*''} | Select-Object Id, Name, MainWindowTitle")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''name:'', p.name\); console.log\(''productName:'', p.build?.productName || p.productName || ''not set''\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_Name -like ''*electron*'' -or $_Name -like ''*Supermarket*'' -or $_Name -like ''*pos*''} | Select-Object Id, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize")
